name: Chicken in Coconut Milk Soup- Gai Tom Kha
recipeIngredient: 1 large whole boned chicken breast, cut into half-inch pieces
2 fresh serrano chiles, sliced into rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the coconut milk, chicken stock, galangal, and lemon grass to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Strain the stock and discard the galangal and lemon grass.
4. Return the strained stock to a boil and add the chicken. Simmer until tender (about 2 minutes).
5. Add fish sauce, citrus leaves, and chiles. Stir in lime juice.
6. Garnish with additional chiles to taste and coriander leaves.
7. Serve hot.
